author: Sabbir77
text: Paid my gas bill on TakaPay in under a minute. Genuinely smooth experience.
english_translation: Paid my gas bill on TakaPay in under a minute. Genuinely smooth experience.

author: Tuhin39
text: Why is TakaPay charging 15 taka to cash out 1500? This is robbery.
english_translation: Why is TakaPay charging 15 taka to cash out 1500? This is robbery.

author: Rakib92
text: TakaPay failed my school fee payment twice. Extremely frustrated with their service.
english_translation: TakaPay failed my school fee payment twice. Extremely frustrated with their service.

author: Tanvir8
text: colleague কে 2500 টাকা পাঠালাম TakaPay দিয়ে, সাথে সাথে চলে গেল।
english_translation: I sent 2500 taka to my colleague using TakaPay, and it went instantly.

author: Sadia64
text: bhai কে টাকা পাঠিয়েছি 2 din আগে, এখনো পৌঁছায়নি। TakaPay কী করছে?
english_translation: I sent money to my brother 2 days ago, still not arrived. What is TakaPay doing?

author: Fahim74
text: আমার একাউন্ট থেকে 300 টাকা কেটে নিয়েছে কিন্তু Teletalk রিচার্জ হয়নি। TakaPay এর কোনো হেল্প নেই।
english_translation: 300 taka was deducted from my account but the Teletalk recharge did not happen. TakaPay has no help.

author: Tanvir29
text: ma কে 2000 টাকা পাঠালাম TakaPay দিয়ে, সাথে সাথে চলে গেল।
english_translation: I sent 2000 taka to my mother using TakaPay, and it went instantly.

author: Lamia26
text: TakaPay e credit card bill dilam ar 1000 taka cashback pelam, darun offer!
english_translation: I paid my credit card bill on TakaPay and got a 1000 taka cashback, great offer!

author: Rima56
text: 300 taka TakaPay theke katlo but receiver pay nai. 2 din dhore atke ache.
english_translation: 300 taka was deducted from TakaPay but the receiver hasn't received it. It has been stuck for 2 days.

author: Nabil12
text: TakaPay diye send money korlam 5000 taka, taka kete nilo kintu pending hoye ache. very bad.
english_translation: I sent 5000 taka via TakaPay, the amount was deducted but it remains pending. Very bad.

author: Priti44
text: TakaPay customer care 5 min e call dhorlo, quick solution dilo. overall valoi.
english_translation: TakaPay customer care answered the call in 5 minutes, gave a quick solution. Overall good.

author: UserDup
text: TakaPay interface is very clean and easy to navigate.
english_translation: TakaPay interface is very clean and easy to navigate.

author: Sadia1
text: Traffic ajke Farmgate e insane, 2 ghonta laglo pouchte.
english_translation: Traffic today at Farmgate is insane, it took 2 hours to reach.

author: Riaz5
text: NgoodPay cashout charge too high, need to find another service.
english_translation: NgoodPay cashout charge too high, need to find another service.

author: Mitu23
text: TakaPay is way faster than NgoodPay, but bKash has more cash out agents.
english_translation: TakaPay is way faster than NgoodPay, but bKash has more cash‑out agents.

author: HasanViral
text: TakaPay application server is down since evening! Cannot pay my emergency hospital bills. Shame!
english_translation: TakaPay application server is down since evening! Cannot pay my emergency hospital bills. Shame!

author: Observer
text: Does TakaPay support international Mastercard or Visa cards for add money?
english_translation: Does TakaPay support international Mastercard or Visa cards for add money?

author: Arif65
text: TakaPay agent kothay pabo Farmgate te? Cash out korte hobe.
english_translation: Where can I find a TakaPay agent at Farmgate? I need to cash out.

author: Nargis1
text: TakaPay এর নতুন UI খুব সুন্দর এবং ব্যবহার করা সহজ।
english_translation: TakaPay's new UI is very beautiful and easy to use.

author: Lamia22
text: amar bon কে টাকা পাঠিয়েছি ৫ দিন আগে, এখনো পৌঁছায়নি। TakaPay কী করছে?
english_translation: I sent money to my sister 5 days ago, it hasn't arrived yet. What is TakaPay doing?

author: Sadia29
text: TakaPay diye amar bon ke 10000 taka pathalam, 30 min hoye gelo ekhono pending!
english_translation: I sent my sister 10,000 taka via TakaPay, 30 minutes have passed and it's still pending!

author: AlexJ
text: TakaPay transaction fees are very low compared to other apps, highly recommended.
english_translation: TakaPay transaction fees are very low compared to other apps, highly recommended.

author: AngryUser
text: TakaPay app keeps crashing during OTP verification. Frustrated!
english_translation: TakaPay app keeps crashing during OTP verification. Frustrated!

author: Rima75
text: আমার একাউন্ট থেকে 10000 টাকা কেটে নিয়েছে কিন্তু Banglalink রিচার্জ হয়নি। TakaPay এর কোনো হেল্প নেই।
english_translation: 10000 taka was deducted from my account but Banglalink recharge did not happen. TakaPay has no help.

author: Sakib85
text: আমার একাউন্ট থেকে 2000 টাকা কেটে নিয়েছে কিন্তু Robi রিচার্জ হয়নি। TakaPay এর কোনো হেল্প নেই।
english_translation: 2000 taka was deducted from my account but Robi recharge did not happen. TakaPay has no help.

author: User30
text: TakaPay is okay I guess.
english_translation: TakaPay is okay I guess.

author: RakibH
text: merchant payment is very fast in TakaPay. Loved it.
english_translation: Merchant payment is very fast in TakaPay. Loved it.

author: Tuhin27
text: TakaPay customer care 2 min e call dhorlo ar problem solve kore dilo. Impressed.
english_translation: TakaPay customer care took the call in 2 minutes and solved the problem. Impressed.
